hero.text: Believe in the magic within you.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Today is ideal for starting new projects. Your energy is high, and you'll be inspired to take bold steps.
aries.love: Open communication with a loved one may lead to deeper understanding.
aries.career: Your hard work will begin to show tangible results today.

taurus.general: Focus on practical matters today. You may find joy in the details.
taurus.love: A surprise from your partner could bring you closer together.
taurus.career: Steady progress in your work will pay off nicely in the long run.

gemini.general: Your social skills are on point. Network and make connections today.
gemini.love: Be open to new romantic opportunities that come your way.
gemini.career: Creative ideas will lead to successful collaborations.

cancer.general: Emotional sensitivity is high today; embrace it and let it guide your interactions.
cancer.love: Quality time with a partner will deepen your bond.
cancer.career: Trust your instincts when making decisions at work.

leo.general: Your natural charisma attracts positive attention. Shine bright!
leo.love: A fun outing can reignite the passion in your relationship.
leo.career: Leadership opportunities may arise; step up and take charge.

virgo.general: Take time to analyze your current situation. Clarity will come with patience.
virgo.love: Small gestures will speak louder than words with loved ones.
virgo.career: Focus on refining your skills; improvement is on the horizon.

libra.general: Balance is key today. Seek harmony in every area of your life.
libra.love: Open self-reflection can lead to breakthroughs in your love life.
libra.career: Collaborative efforts will yield fruitful results.

scorpio.general: Intensity is your ally today. Use it to fuel your passions.
scorpio.love: Honesty will strengthen your relationships; express your true feelings.
scorpio.career: Strategic moves will allow you to navigate challenges successfully.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls! Embrace spontaneity and new experiences.
sagittarius.love: Keep it light and fun; don't take things too seriously today.
sagittarius.career: Your enthusiasm can inspire others; lead with confidence.

capricorn.general: Focus on your long-term goals. Small steps lead to big success.
capricorn.love: Stability in your relationship will provide comfort.
capricorn.career: Today, networking can unlock new opportunities for you.

aquarius.general: Innovation is key. Think outside the box and embrace new ideas.
aquarius.love: An unexpected gesture could turn a mundane day into something special.
aquarius.career: Your unique perspective will help in problem-solving today.

pisces.general: Creativity flows easily. Harness it for personal projects.
pisces.love: A romantic gesture will deepen your emotional connection.
pisces.career: Trust your intuition; it will guide your decisions successfully.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

professional.text: In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
professional.author: Albert Einstein

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Success doesn’t just find you. You have to go out and get it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: The harder you work for something, the greater you’ll feel when you achieve it.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: Just because you're awake doesn't mean you should stop dreaming.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: The best time for new beginnings is now.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Do what makes your soul shine.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology: the art of orchestrating the future.
tech.author: Unknown

tech.text: The future is already here – it’s just not very evenly distributed.
tech.author: William Gibson

tech.text: Technological innovation is not only a tool; it is an opportunity.
tech.author: Unknown

tech.text: Every new technology is an improvement over the past.
tech.author: Unknown

tech.text: Keep pushing the boundaries of what is possible.
tech.author: Unknown

fun.text: Life is short. Smile while you still have teeth.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why so serious? Let’s have some fun!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: You can’t make everyone happy. You’re not a taco.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Dream big, sparkle more, shine bright.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Be a voice, not an echo.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Believe you can and you’re halfway there.
faith.author: Theodore Roosevelt

faith.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
faith.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

faith.text: Faith does not make things easy, it makes them possible.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: To be a Christian means to be a worker.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Let your faith be bigger than your fear.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: In the end, we only regret the chances we didn't take.
wisdom.author: Lewis Carroll

wisdom.text: Wisdom is the reward you get for a lifetime of listening when you'd rather have been talking.
wisdom.author: Mark Twain

wisdom.text: The wise man does not lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for himself.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha
